title: Mongolmoyee Santoshi Maa
subTitle: Santoshi, a young devotee of Santoshi Maa, the Hindu goddess, believes her faith and devotion can get her out of every complicated situation.

title: Tui Amar Hero
subTitle: Shakyajit is in the midst of a toxic affair and lets short-lived fame get to his head. But when he marries Aarshi, a singer who sacrifices her career for her family, his life trajectory shifts.

title: Joyar Bhata
subTitle: Uji and Nisha, two sisters, share a close relationship, but are polar opposites. Later, when Uji's marriage turns troublesome, Nisha steps out to seek revenge.

title: Amader Dadamoni
subTitle: A devoted elder brother shoulders the responsibility of raising his siblings while facing societal expectations and personal challenges that test his resolve.

title: Chirodini Tumi Je Amar
subTitle: Wealthy businessman Arya marries a simple 20-year-old girl, Aparna. Things take a turn for the worse when Arya's past and Aparna's bizarre visions reveal a fatal secret.

title: Parineeta
subTitle: Parul, the young girl from a village, feels desperate to prove her mettle to herself in a difficult environment. Moreover, she faces challenges from Rayan's family in order to impress him.

title: Kusum
subTitle: Adored by her community, Kusum, a vivacious young woman, is known for her quick wit and captivating personality, as she aspires to win the approval of her idol, Indrani Ganguly.

title: Anandi
subTitle: Anandi, an aspiring doctor from a lower-middle-class family, begins working as a nurse due to her father's illness. However, things take a turn when she crosses paths with her idol, Dr Adidev Lahiri.

title: Kone Dekha Alo
subTitle: A wedding-day confusion exchanges the destinies of Bonolata and Lajbonti. This propels them into diverse societies where they uncover affection and identity.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

subTitle: A tale of two generational approaches to love, where Generation X's openness blends with Generation Y's secrecy, unfolding amid family conflicts and a teenager's covert struggle for justice.

title: Tare Dhori Dhori Mone Kori
subTitle: Gora discovers Pulastya has taken Diti to a wedding venue. Later, he confronts Pulastya for coercing her into marriage before she rejects his plea to return to Goswami House.

title: Jamuna Dhaki
subTitle: Jamuna is forced to take up her father's position as a drum player. When she gets married into an aristocratic family, she struggles to maintain a balance in her personal and professional life.
